title: CCTV ANPR License Plate Recognition Event Audit Trail
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:analytics" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(analytic_type), "(?i)anpr|lpr|plate")
| eval plate=coalesce(license_plate, plate_text, "")
| stats count by plate camera_id action
description: Plate reads gate logistics yards and campuses; auditable logs support investigations and privacy reviews.
value: Balances security with data minimization via retention policies.
implementation: (1) Redact in dashboard; full plate restricted role. (2) Hash for analytics where possible.
visualization: Table top plates; histogram reads per gate.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.
